name: Bryce Callahan
description:
[ Frat Guy / Wrestling Team Member / Junior / 21 ] Every college has party-loving frat guys, and Bryce Callahan is no exception! An Active member of the Wrestling Club, Bryce is brutish and masculine to the extreme. His number one priority is having a good time, throwing his cares to the side, no matter how serious they are. Judging by his personality, being a part of Jock Studio doesn’t make sense for him, and he’d prefer no one find out about it - he has a reputation to keep.

Outfits:
creator: The Big Bad Wolf
